question: What will the following code print?
code:
grade = 89
name = "Cam"
print(f"Hello [name], your grade is [grade] ")
explanation: Be careful! When it comes to formatted strings, you need to embed variables using curly braces `{}`.

question: What will the following code print?
code:
uncensored = "This bleeping bleep has stolen my bleeps!"
censored = uncensored.replace("bleep", "****")
print(censored)
options: This bleeping bleep has stolen my bleeps!
